quests.start_text: Guide: Cook food, smelt a bar, smith and equip a weapon, defeat an enemy, use the bank and shop, then return.
quests.completed_text: Guide: The village is safer because of you.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Starter path. Reward: 50 coins, +40 Smithing XP.

quests.start_text: Warden: Check the bank, trade at the store, and clear one threat from the road, then report back.
quests.in_progress_text: Warden: The road is not ready yet. Still needed: {missing_objectives}.
quests.completed_text: Warden: The road crew can move again thanks to you.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Trail supplies. Reward: 35 coins, +25 Defence XP.

quests.start_text: Steward: The field crew needs one cooked meal stored before the next shift. Cook food, use the bank, then report back.
quests.in_progress_text: Steward: The stores are not ready yet. Still needed: {missing_objectives}.
quests.completed_text: Steward: The crew can work through the morning now.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Field provisions. Reward: 25 coins, +20 Cooking XP.

quests.start_text: Scout: Pick up supplies at the shop, equip a weapon, bank any spare coin, and clear one road threat before you report back.
quests.in_progress_text: Scout: The watch is not done yet. Still needed: {missing_objectives}.
quests.completed_text: Scout: The road holds steady for now.
quests.completion_text: Quest complete: Road watch. Reward: 30 coins, +20 Attack XP.
